inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User's body weight in kilograms. Used to compute energy expenditure.

businessContext_i18n.en: User's body weight in kilograms. Used to compute energy expenditure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanıcının kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı. Enerji harcamasını hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent jumping rope in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time spent jumping rope in minutes.

inputs.label: Jumps per Minute
inputs.businessContext: Average number of rope skips per minute. Influences intensity (MET).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of rope skips per minute. Influences intensity (MET).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakika başına ortalama ip atlama sayısı. Yoğunluğu (MET) etkiler.

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Individual fitness variation multiplier (1.0 = average, >1 = higher calorie burn).

businessContext_i18n.en: Individual fitness variation multiplier (1.0 = average, >1 = higher calorie burn).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireysel fitness değişim çarpanı (1.0 = ortalama, >1 = daha yüksek kalori yakımı).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
